description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named build that runs on push and pull request events. The workflow has three jobs: build, linting, and deploy. The build job runs on multiple OS and Python versions, installing tox and running tests. The linting job runs on ubuntu-latest, installing tox and running linting tests. The deploy job runs on ubuntu-latest, only on push events with a tag ref, and depends on build and linting jobs, installing wheel, building a package, and publishing it to PyPI.
